flags_raised: Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 19.7% aligned with expected compliance behavior
Behavioral drift detected: 33.8% deviation from historical baseline

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed due to a missing constraint in the system prompt that didn't explicitly instruct it to adhere to policy rule R005 requiring procurement team approval for new vendor onboarding.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction while ensuring compliance with all policy rules, specifically verifying procurement team approval for new vendor onboarding as per R005 and obtaining secondary manager signature for expenditures exceeding $5,000 USD as per R001.
remediation.constraint_added: Ensure procurement team approval for new vendor onboarding and verify payment amount against established expenditure guidelines.
preventive_measures: Implement regular audits of agent outputs against expected compliance behavior to detect semantic divergence early.
Develop and integrate a real-time policy rule validation module to enforce adherence to established guidelines during agent decision-making processes.
Establish a continuous training and feedback loop for agents, incorporating historical baseline data and behavioral drift detection to improve compliance scores.

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
